allow: Bash(docker compose exec web bundle exec rubocop*)
Bash(docker compose exec web bundle exec rspec*)
Bash(docker compose exec web bundle exec rails*)
Bash(docker compose exec frontend npm run lint*)
Bash(docker compose exec frontend npm run test*)
Bash(docker compose exec frontend npm run build*)
Bash(docker compose exec frontend npx prettier*)

hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.rb ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *_spec.rb ]]; then docker compose exec -T web bundle exec rubocop --autocorrect "${FILE#$(pwd)/}" 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then REL="${FILE#$(pwd)/frontend/}"; docker compose exec -T frontend npx prettier --write "src/$REL" 2>/dev/null; docker compose exec -T frontend npx eslint --fix "src/$REL" 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
